author: DevidCode
description: Publish the active note as a WordPress draft, directly via the REST API or through a custom webhook. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: DevidCode
manifest.description: Publish the active note as a WordPress draft, directly via the REST API or through a custom webhook.
manifest.name: Publish to WordPress

name: Publish to WordPress

releases.author: DevidCode
releases.description:
Publish the active note as a WordPress draft — via the WordPress REST API (Application Passwords) or a custom webhook (n8n).

- Featured image support (frontmatter `image:` or first embedded image).
- Configurable backend + settings.
- Code review fixes: typed API responses, no vault-wide file enumeration.
